inputs.description:
Run the batch enrichment to populate the authority_enrichment table with Wikidata metadata.

1. First, apply the enrichment schema if needed:
   sqlite3 data/index/bibliographic.db < scripts/enrichment/schema.sql 2>/dev/null || true

2. Run batch enrichment:
   cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot && poetry run python -m scripts.enrichment.run_batch_enrichment

   This fetches Wikidata metadata for agents with NLI authority URIs.

3. Populate authority_enrichment table:
   cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot && poetry run python -m scripts.enrichment.populate_authority_enrichment

4. Re-enrich with relationships:
   cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot && poetry run python -m scripts.enrichment.reenrich_with_relationships

5. Verify:
   python3 -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect('data/index/bibliographic.db'); ae=c.execute('SELECT count(*) FROM authority_enrichment').fetchone()[0]; print(f'Enriched agents: {ae}')"
inputs.testCommand: cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot && python3 -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect('data/index/bibliographic.db'); ae=c.execute('SELECT count(*) FROM authority_enrichment').fetchone()[0]; print(f'Enriched: {ae}'); assert ae > 100"
